calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Amendments And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the parties had mediation on November 29, 2018, that the last time this matter was on calendar was in November and was continued as no status report was submitted by anybody, and that it has no idea what is happening in this case or if the parties resolved this. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust, etc. is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Amendments And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Feb-05-2019 Continued To Mar-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Amendments And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Amendments And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Jan-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Amendments And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Nov-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Audrey Gerard appeared by telephone for Petitioners.
Richard Bryan for John Gallegos (Respondent).

Mr. Bryan stated that they had four hours of mediation on September 5th, that he felt they needed more time, that the Parties are still somewhat apart and that more time would have been helpful. Mr. Bryan also stated that at the conclusion of mediation his Client was served with a civil case involving a transaction from three years ago regarding ownership of a bank account, that the Decedent changed title of the account into his Client's name, that things are very complicated, and requested a 60-day continuance to determine what they want to do, whether consolidation makes sense and perhaps setting restrictions on evidence. Ms. Gerard stated that she and her Client felt they made very little progress, that she does not think another mediation is in order and that she needs to file an amendment to the March 13, 2017 petition. The Amended Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust, etc. is continued to November 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court suggests the Parties work towards making this less complicated.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Amendments And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2018 Continued To Sep-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Amendments And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Continued To Aug-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Amendments And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar May-29-2018 Continued To Jun-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And Amendments And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust.
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Continued To May-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Bryan for John Gallegos (Respondent)
Audrey Gerard for Petitioners via Court Call

Mr. Bryan estimated 5-10 trial days for this matter, reported he is completing discovery with a deposition at the end of this month. Ms. Gerard stated she is done with discovery with just one more testimony from a witness and any supplemental discovery that may be needed. Both Counsel stated they are willing to participate in mediation. The Court informed Counsel no trial date will be set today. The Amended Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust, etc. is continued to May 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for completion of discovery. The Parties are to determine if they are going to mediate. If they have not mediated, the parties are to have met and conferred and filed a Joint Status Statement outlining issues, number of witnesses, number of exhibits and how long the trial will take by May 22, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
